ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Pants) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size chart is active */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size chart is for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size chart is for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the size */,
  "equivalent_sizes" TEXT /* Equivalent sizes in other standards (e.g., 0 - 2, 4 - 6) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is active */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest_min" REAL /* Minimum chest measurement in cm */,
  "chest_max" REAL /* Maximum chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement in cm */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips_min" REAL /* Minimum hips measurement in cm */,
  "hips_max" REAL /* Maximum hips measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_min" REAL /* Minimum sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_max" REAL /* Maximum sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width_min" REAL /* Minimum shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width_max" REAL /* Maximum shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length_min" REAL /* Minimum inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length_max" REAL /* Maximum inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size in the source standard */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size in the target standard */,
  "from_standard" TEXT /* Source standard (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "to_standard" TEXT /* Target standard (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size conversion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size conversion is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the product is for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product size is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "chest" REAL /* Customer's chest measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Customer's waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips" REAL /* Customer's hips measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Customer's sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Customer's shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Customer's inseam length measurement in cm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer measurement */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the customer is for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the customer is for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "recommended_size_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the recommended size */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the size recommendation (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
